decision: Use mock 03 as the title composition, mock 02 for palette balance, and mock 04 only for the one-shot bounce/sweep motion idea.
runtimeGuidance: Render the main character live on the right side of the title screen.
Keep title text and buttons as real DOM on the left.
Use amber, cobalt, lime, cream, and gunmetal rather than the previous cyan-only title treatment.
Keep the title split across two non-wrapping lines: GADGET and RIFT.
Use the character-removed background plate at public/assets/title/gadget-rift-title-bg.webp behind the live Three.js character.
Render the title character with local clipping disabled only for the title pass, then restore renderer.localClippingEnabled for gameplay.
